title: Income Tax Department ने जारी किए Income Tax Act, 2025 Transition पर Comprehensive FAQs (Updated April 19, 2026)
content:
# Income Tax Department ने जारी किए Income Tax Act, 2025 Transition पर Comprehensive FAQs (Updated April 19, 2026)

Ek important update hai. Income Tax Department (CBDT) ne Income Tax Act, 2025 ke transition ko lekar comprehensive Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) release kiye hain. Iska main objective hai ki taxpayers ko naye Act ke implementation aur purane Act se naye Act mein shift hone par poori clarity mile.

Yeh FAQs 1st April 2026 se effective hone wale Income Tax Act, 2025 ke smooth transition ko facilitate karne ke liye design kiye gaye hain. Ismein kai critical areas par guidance di gayi hai:

*   **New 'Tax Year' Concept:** Naye Act mein 'Previous Year' ki jagah 'Tax Year' introduce kiya gaya hai, jo 1st April 2026 se shuru hone wale income ke liye applicable hoga. Ye change taxation ko financial year ke saath align karta hai.
*   **Continuity of Proceedings:** Department ne clarify kiya hai ki Income-tax Act, 1961 ke under pending assessments, appeals, reassessments, aur refund claims, jo 1st April 2026 se pehle ke tax years se related hain, un par purana Act hi apply hoga. Naye Act se pehle kiye gaye actions invalid nahi honge.
*   **No New Tax Burden:** FAQs confirm karte hain ki Income Tax Act, 2025 ka aim tax simplification aur transparency hai, na ki koi naya tax impose karna ya tax burden badhana.
*   **Compliance Mechanisms:** TDS, advance tax, aur self-assessment tax jaise core compliance mechanisms ki policy mein zyada change nahi hai, unhein bas simplified format mein present kiya gaya hai.
*   **E-filing Portal:** Transition period ke dauraan, e-filing portal dono Acts ke under compliance ko support karega, taaki seamless filing aur processing ho sake.

Yeh FAQs taxpayers, professionals, aur administrators ko naye regime mein shift hone ke dauraan aane wali practical questions ko address karte hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/help/income-tax-act-2025)

*Published on: 20 April 2026*
